review_title: Foundation for Starting at a Company
author: Hannah K.
pros: I like that with a simple search of a department or person I can see the highlights of their job and where they are located.
cons: Don't have anything - it works great for me.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall I've had a wonderful experience with Charthop
author: Eric Y.
pros: I loved all the different functionalities on the HRIS
cons: Sometimes the system gets quite laggy. Hoping to get it fixed
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Tina B.
pros: It's excellent at giving a visual view of an org.
cons: You can't easily see the historical progression of someone in different roles. You can't do budgeting in it easily
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Experience is positive but I feel that confidential information should not be shared with peers.
author: Yoo Jin J.
pros: Able to put all the data in a one place and manage.
cons: Sometimes its difficult to zoom in and out.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: It was good just feels like you need a lot of time to get everything set up.
author: Franco P.
pros: Simple and easy to use and set up. The features available to use.
cons: Time to get everything set up for use and implementation.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I like it helps identify potential issues, and make strategic decisions.
author: Joleen A.
pros: The real-time organizational charting that is provided.
cons: I can't say anything bad Its really useful with all of its support that it provides.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall, Charthop has been positive for our org.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It allows us to create a process for hire approval and management changes.
cons: Changes are not the easiest if you don't know how to code.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: A clean, clear view of the org chart and more
description: Easy to use, good UI, very useful understanding reporting in a department or whole org.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Love the fact that you can go back in time and clearly see who was at the company years ago, who is having an anniversary, who is being promoted, who is departing, etc.
cons: I think it does what its supposed to do very well.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use! organizes the company structure with no issues
cons: there are nothing I like least about this software
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's super easy to navigate and search through our org chart of ~500 employees. You can even see where someone is based and get a direct link to them in Slack. Great for remote orgs!
cons: The UI feels just a little dates. At least in our implementation. I found getting to a map view to be a little counterintuitive.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall pretty good, the pros definitely outweigh the cons and I think the ease of use is pretty good.
author: Rachael L.
pros: We use this for setting our MBOs and it does make is fairly easy to see what is being done. It breaks it down by month and has you label each goal which is very helpful.
cons: I think the only issue I have is I wish the interface of editing a goal was a little easier after it has been submitted instead of someone else having to do it.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: I use it on a daily basis and its the best
author: NITYA P.
pros: all the info that you need about your org and its employers
cons: nothing that i don't like about the software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: ChartHop is a super intuitive tool for performance review and management
author: Bryan S.
pros: Performance review setup is easy and doesn't need to look for any tutorials.
cons: Too many features, not sure why some of them get organized as the current structure.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great for New Employees and Admins!
description: Overall ChartHop is a great tool that I use daily. I'm so glad that our company has this resource available to employees, especially as an administrative assistant working with multiple calendars.
author: Alex W.
pros: I love that I can easily look up employees and org charts!
cons: User experience within the org chart. It zooms in and moves around too easily making it feel almost disorienting. I love the idea of being able to move around the org chart easily, but I think I would prefer it to be a bit more static.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Joe B.
pros: This was a great product for employees to quickly fill out a quick, easy-to-access, and easy-to-use survey for self-identification. As a member of the LGBTQ community and ERG group at Ripple, I was happy to see that our company was giving everyone an opportunity to self-identify. This promotes a good culture and gives us the stats to improve!
cons: On the end user side, I thought it was intuitive, easy-to-use, and had a good interface. No complaints from me.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Enrique G.
pros: Being able to see the things that are important all in one place with a clean user interface.
cons: None. It does what it needs to do. Perhaps some visual improvements to hero data. Micro interactions.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: ChartHop easy to use and great for HR Analytics
author: RALPH W.
pros: ChartHop easy to use and great for HR Analytics
cons: Not applicable for this. There is nothing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Ileana R.
pros: The dashboard is showing very good functionalities like birthdays and anniversaries.
cons: The organizational chart it's hard to scroll or zoom in zoom out.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Sarah H.
pros: Charthop is not only very easy to use, but is very beneficial in my role when working with many people through the company, especially being such a large remote team.
cons: So far, there have been no issues I have encountered with ChartHop
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great system compared to what we have used in the past.
description: Great, would recommend to most companies 1000+ employees.
author: Eric S.
pros: Org chart is great and easy to find what I want to see. It is also easy to set objectives for quarter.
cons: Sort of difficult to figure out at first but much better than other systems to be honest.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I think it's great that management can see everyone's goals and know what we hope to accomplish professionally. I'm sure it makes it easier to have conversations regarding everyone's future at the company.
author: Ariana B.
pros: I like that I can see the hierarchy, people moves, and birthdays/anniversaries all in one place so I can see exactly what's going on within the company.
cons: It's a little bit difficult to put in goals. The form broke a couple times while I was using it, but it did eventually work.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Stephanie T.
pros: I like being able to easily drill down into organizations visually. I also really like the fact that it includes birthdays. I also like that you can see who is in your area. This is helpful in a fully distributed company.
cons: I don't like the accuracy of being able to see where someone lives, but it seems like this feature might have been toned down
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: So far, so good! Easy to understand from a user perspective
author: Hayley W.
pros: It's easy to use, a fairly simplified layout and only gets better the more data you put into it.
cons: If you have a very flag org chart, it can be a little challenging to everyone in a single layer, in a simplified, zoomed out screen.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Eph M.
pros: Get to access the whole Org chart and get to know all of my company office mates.
cons: Not easy to use search option, more training options or guide.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Thomas W.
pros: Simple, navigable UI/UX that adapts in real time to changes, views, and functions. Awesome stuff!
cons: N/A no issues thus far having used it for a bit!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
